analysis_commentary: min_positions=200k collapsed: max reached 1.0 by probe 20 (t≈318s) and illegal_mass locked at 1.0 thereafter; max_grad_global_norm=106.7 (exceeded 100 alarm). Halfway-point was not enough to buffer past the early-training instability that 300k avoided — consistent with the pattern but not distinguishable from seed variance in a single run.
